title: SpaceBan has no /changes method — incremental sync gap
description: space_ban.rs implements only space_ban_get and space_ban_set. If the spec defines SpaceBan/changes (RFC 8620 §5.2 applies to all JMAP object types), there is no method to incrementally sync ban records after an SSE StateChange event. The TUI client_task would fall back to a full space_ban_get on every state change event, which scales poorly for spaces with many bans. This is a missing-method gap that a maintainer must add later when integrating ban management into the TUI event loop.
